phases.name: TheIntercept real-fixing (probe-driven)
phases.description: Pursue the TheIntercept e2e against the REAL story (playback probe as the gate), one real blocker at a time. Step 01-01 clears the line-4 dead-end at the real opts gather. Compiler/ only; no runtime change.

steps.name: Advance native TheIntercept past the real opts gather
criteria: Native TheIntercept no longer dead-ends at the real opts gather; it plays strictly more than 4 oracle-matching lines, reaching at least the waited stitch (oracle index 4).
A ratchet AT pins the achieved floor: native[0..<N] == oracle[0..<N] with N strictly greater than the prior 4.
The real opts gather is handled: a labelled gather with a variable-text lead, multiple nested choices including level-2 choices, and a -> opts loop-back.
No regression in the full suite (incl. the Phase-3 variable-text-threading and #4b choice-label ATs, both TheIntercept playthroughs).
steps.scenario_name: TheIntercept native plays past the opts gather, matching the oracle prefix
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM: example-based Swift Testing oracle execution-equivalence per CLAUDE.md (OOP; PBT N/A). Backtick function-name style MANDATORY; @Test("string") FORBIDDEN. PROBE-DRIVEN REAL-FIXING (user decision 2026-06-16): synthetic minimal fixtures false-greened (see feature-delta #4b re-diagnosis), so drive against the REAL story. The driver/diagnostic is DIAG_INTERCEPT2 (Tests/.../Diagnostics/TheInterceptPlaybackProbe.swift): native currently dead-ends at output line 4 entering the real opts gather (start knot, source ~line 85): a LABELLED gather '- (opts)' with a variable-text lead {|I rattle...|}, nested choices (think)/(plan)/[Wait] where (plan) has its own level-2 choices (cooperate/dissemble/delay), and a '-> opts' loop-back; the gather closes '- -> waited'. Phase 3 fixed only a shallow miniature; this is the real shape. RED: author an ENABLED ratchet AT in a NEW suite Compiler_TheInterceptProgressTests.swift asserting native plays >=N oracle-matching lines (compile TheIntercept, play along [0,2,1,0,0,1,2,0,1,0], assert native.count>=N && native[0..<N]==oracle[0..<N]); set the RED target N just past the opts gather (>=5, the waited line). It must fail now (native has 4 lines). GREEN: fix the real opts emission in Compiler/ (do NOT change the runtime); after GREEN run DIAG_INTERCEPT2 and set N to the ACTUAL achieved matching-line count (maximize the ratchet up to the next real blocker). Investigate with a throwaway dump (remove before commit). If a fix needs a file beyond files_to_modify or a runtime change, STOP and escalate. Do NOT re-enable the TheIntercept e2e (full equivalence not yet reached). Boundary: no Engine/ import (R1); no JSONSerialization (R5); no runtime/Decoder change. DONE (commit 4686262): stitch-local divert qualification; native 4->9 played, matched floor N=6.

steps.name: Resolve the real deeply-nested start.delay read-count guard
criteria: The real start.delay dotted read-count (a choice label nested 3 levels deep: start -> opts -> plan -> delay) resolves to .readCount, so the {not start.delay} guard on the tellme choice in start.waited evaluates correctly.
The DIAG_INTERCEPT2 surviving-dotted count drops toward 0 and native advances past oracle index 6; the ratchet AT N is bumped to the new achieved floor.
No regression in the full suite.
steps.scenario_name: native TheIntercept plays past the opts gather, matching the oracle prefix
steps.implementation_notes: PROBE-DRIVEN. After 01-01 the probe's next blocker is oracle index 6: the {not start.delay} guard on the tellme choice in start.waited. start.delay is a surviving unresolved dotted variableReference: (delay) is a choice label nested 3 levels deep (start -> opts gather -> plan choice -> delay choice), referenced FLAT as start.delay. inklecate resolves by NAME in the knot's flat namespace regardless of physical depth; native's discovery pre-pass registers by physical path so the flat ref misses (the shallow #4b fixture passed but the deep real ref does not). FIX (Compiler/ only): extend the discovery pre-pass (WeaveEmitter) so a labelled weave point nested at ANY depth in a knot is ALSO addressable by knot.label (name in the knot's flat namespace), keyed to its already-computed absolute path (reuse keyPrefix; never re-derive); ensure lowerExpression resolves it (RuntimeObjectEmitter) and the auto-flag reconciliation flags the target. RED: bump the ratchet AT N to just past oracle index 6 (the tellme path). GREEN: fix; re-run DIAG_INTERCEPT2; set N to the actual achieved floor. Throwaway dump ok (remove before commit). If blocked beyond Compiler/ or needs a runtime change, STOP and escalate. Do NOT re-enable the TheIntercept e2e. Boundary R1/R3/R5; no runtime/Decoder change.

validation.reviewer: orchestrator (probe-driven phase; gates run before execution)
validation.notes: Probe-driven real-fixing per user decision 2026-06-16 (minimal fixtures false-greened). Single step clears the line-4 real-opts-gather dead-end, gated by the DIAG_INTERCEPT2 playback probe + a ratchet AT. Further blockers handled in subsequent steps as the probe reveals them.
